gap.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the indicator component for the space between dots: M3 ships no page indicator (the carousel conveys position through item size), so the theme applies the M2-era pager-dot convention of 8dp separation (theme-author decision, spec Assumptions).

color.$description: Material 3 color used by the indicator component for the resting dot fill: the M2-era pager-dot convention dims resting dots to a low-emphasis on-surface alpha (theme-author decision; the scheme flip rides the semantic layer).

inline-size.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the indicator component for the current dot inline size: uniform 8dp circles per the M2-era pager-dot convention — emphasis is color, not elongation (theme-author decision, spec Assumptions).

block-size.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the indicator component for the current dot block size: uniform 8dp circles per the M2-era pager-dot convention (theme-author decision).

color.$description: Material 3 color used by the indicator component for the current dot: the M2-era pager-dot convention emphasizes the current position by color alone — the theme's primary surface role (theme-author decision).

hole-block-size.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the indicator component for the current pill hole: zero — the ring construction collapses to a solid dot, the uniform-circle M2 reading (rings width derives as (block size − hole) / 2).
